name: Source Fidelity review for Validity Conditions and Controlled Comparison Update bundle
summary: Accepted. The four included sources are full-text or authoritative primary-source records with DOI/arXiv/ACL/Springer metadata, and the staged findings include section-level locators. The SMART extraction now includes recoverable Table 1 numeric results, so no numeric extraction follow-up is needed for publication.

findings.claim_or_issue: Nguyen and Cao, Cao et al., SMART, and Wu et al. are grounded in primary source pages/PDFs with full-text access metadata and section locators.
findings.why_it_matters: The new validity-conditions synthesis depends on recent primary literature rather than secondary summaries.
findings.recommended_action: Keep the source URLs, DOI/arXiv/ACL metadata, and section-level locators in the staged records.
